name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: PLS Check Cashers is a 24/7 financial services store offering check cashing, money orders, bill pay, Ria money transfers, and government benefit processing.
description_long:
PLS Financial Services, Inc. operates a network of check cashing and financial services stores across 12 states — Arizona, California, Illinois, Indiana, Kentucky, Massachusetts, New York, North Carolina, Ohio, Oklahoma, Texas, and Wisconsin. In Illinois, PLS operates as a Community Currency Exchange under state licensing, functioning as a licensed alternative financial services provider. The company positions itself as a 24/7 one-stop shop for both financial transactions and administrative needs, serving consumers who may lack access to or prefer not to use traditional banking.

At this Chicago location on W. Armitage Ave., PLS offers an extensive set of financial services: check cashing, money orders, bill payment, Ria Money Transfer for domestic and international remittances, government benefit check processing, and foreign currency exchange. Beyond core financial offerings, Illinois PLS locations double as vehicle services centers, handling state registration and renewals, title transfers, license plate issuance, and city sticker and transit card purchases — services that would otherwise require a separate DMV or currency exchange visit. The store also issues the Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard, a prepaid Mastercard with an associated mobile app, offering a form of payment access to customers without traditional checking accounts.

PLS differentiates itself primarily through 24/7 hours of operation — every service category, including financial, transportation, business, and other services, is listed as available around the clock. This is uncommon in the check cashing industry, where most stores keep standard business hours. The combination of financial services and Illinois vehicle administration under one roof reduces the number of separate errands consumers must run. The Ria Money Transfer partnership gives customers access to a globally recognized remittance network, and notary and fax services round out the in-store utility.

PLS Check Cashers is a practical option for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need immediate financial services at any hour. The breadth of services — from foreign exchange to notary services to phone top-ups — makes it one of the more comprehensive check cashing alternatives available. However, the website discloses no fee information for any service, including check cashing rates and money order costs. Industry fees for check cashing typically range from 1% to 12% of the check face value, and consumers should request the full fee schedule before transacting. PLS does not offer personal loans, savings accounts, or any credit products.
pros: Open 24/7 — all service categories available around the clock, including nights and weekends
Ria Money Transfer available in-store for international and domestic remittances
Illinois vehicle services (registration, title transfers, license plates, city stickers) handled on-site
Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard issued in-store with a companion mobile app
Notary services available for wills, deeds, trusts, power of attorney, and other legal documents
Foreign currency exchange available for international travelers or immigrants
Government benefit check processing available alongside standard check cashing
cons: No fee information disclosed anywhere on the website — check cashing rates and money order costs are opaque
No personal loans, lines of credit, or any credit products offered
No FDIC-insured savings or interest-bearing accounts — Xpectations card is prepaid, not a bank account
Only operates in 12 states — not available to most of the US
As an alternative financial services provider, costs for routine transactions likely exceed those at a bank or credit union
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing immediate check cashing at any hour
Illinois residents needing vehicle registration or title transfers outside standard DMV hours
Immigrants or workers needing to send money internationally via Ria Money Transfer
Consumers needing notary services, bill pay, or phone top-ups in a single stop
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate financial services — especially check cashing, bill pay, or international transfers — outside of standard banking hours. The 24/7 availability and Illinois vehicle services make it unusually convenient, but consumers should ask for the full fee schedule upfront, as no pricing is disclosed on the website and alternative financial services fees can be significantly higher than bank equivalents.
